title: Digital Marketing Specialist (all genders)
required_skills: Website management (CMS, SEO, GA4, Google Tag Manager, Google Search Console)
Experience with external agencies and cross-functional teams
Analytical skills - translate data into actionable insights
Strong written and verbal communication in English
matched_skills: 4+ years digital marketing experience including B2B (IPC, GRG Banking)
Campaign execution and lead management (campaign analytics, funnel optimization, lead analytics)
Cross-functional team coordination (listed skill, Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC experience)
Strong analytical skills - data to insights (core profile strength)
missing_skills: GA4 / Google Tag Manager / Google Search Console
Google Ads / LinkedIn Ads campaign management
External agency coordination for paid media
core_responsibilities: Manage and optimize HubSpot CRM: campaign setup, segmentation, automation workflows, lead scoring, email marketing, dashboards
Execute integrated B2B digital marketing campaigns and manage MQL handover with sales teams
Coordinate with external agencies for Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads campaign execution
Manage corporate website: content publishing, SEO, GA4 analytics, act as webmaster
Track and report on campaign and channel performance, generate insights for continuous improvement
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B campaign analytics and funnel optimization experience (IPC product launch, GRG Banking multi-market campaigns)
Emphasize data-to-insights storytelling capability as proxy for analytics/reporting responsibilities
Stress cross-functional coordination experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC PMO)
Acknowledge HubSpot gap honestly; position Power BI / Looker Studio analytics skills as transferable
Note: CV lacks core hard skills (HubSpot, website/CMS, paid media) - this is a significant gap; manage expectations
